7_smoke_terminal_travel.notes: OpenAI classification succeeded and render_help produced a full app:column help widget, but the execution is FAILED because the audit INSERT SQL in log_classification renders a malformed Jinja replace expression inside a SQL literal. This blocks GREEN.

failure_modes: Travel runtime failed after classification because log_classification audit SQL is malformed.

regressions_found.name: travel_agent log_classification SQL quoting
regressions_found.details: The travel runtime Pydantic-validates and registers, and OpenAI classification produced the expected help intent/widget. The Postgres audit step fails at runtime because the query embeds `{{ parse_classification | tojson | replace("'", "''") }}` inside a SQL string; Postgres receives a malformed expression and marks the execution failed. The task's 3 planned PRs were already merged, so I stopped rather than opening an unapproved 4th ops PR.

notes: All three planned PRs merged and the public GUI v1.10.0 image was deployed to local kind.
Both new playbooks were registered in the local catalog.
The flagship smoke is not GREEN because the travel runtime execution status is FAILED despite producing render_help output.
No validation log entry was appended because verdict is AMBER.
deferred_followups: Fix travel runtime log_classification audit SQL quoting and rerun terminal/canvas/MCP/provider smokes.
Phase 2: travel agent uses the Amadeus MCP server internally instead of direct HTTP
Phase 3: full AI provider parity smoke matrix (openai/vertex/anthropic/ollama all green)
Wire hotels and activities branches in the travel agent (currently fall through to render_help)
app:form widget for refining Amadeus filters (cabin class, max price, etc.) before re-running
